_aboutme: ABOUTME: Curated stat-roll variance rule (no variance keys exist in items or records/game/,
ABOUTME: so the engine's jitter is reproduced here; see docs/item-schema.md).
Rule: display range = base * (1 - jitter/100) .. base * (1 + jitter/100), each end then
scaled by (1 + attributeScalePercent/100) where the record carries that key. Affix stats
read jitter from their own record's lootRandomizerJitter; item self-stats use the curated
item_attribute_jitter_percent below. Integer stats round outward (floor low, ceil high)
so the printed range always contains the base roll.
Exemptions never roll: the ids listed, plus every stat on augment and component records.
calibration: pending U4: candidates 12.5 (Sacrificial Knife card implies +7/+9% around base 8) vs 20 (community documentation); U4 locks the value that reproduces the screenshot corpus and records the evidence here
